label: sandbox • combined mode: host paths via file_read, VM paths via sandbox tools
query: Two files exist: notes/readme.md in the read-only host workspace, and data/info.txt in your sandbox home. Each contains a token line. Read both files, then write both tokens on one line (host token first, separated by a single space) to combined.txt in your sandbox home.
notes: Path-routing discipline in combined mode: reads on both surfaces must succeed with zero path-validation errors. The unified router intentionally lets file_read serve /workspace/... paths via the sandbox read bridge, so the audit pins zero errors on every read tool rather than demanding sandbox_read_file specifically. The combined output can only be produced by actually reading both sides.
